title: Urgent Opening Teacher at EduComp Solutions Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Teacher at EduComp Solutions Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at EduComp Solutions Digital Technologies. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Teacher to strengthen our Kochi-based team.

About EduComp Solutions Digital Technologies:
EduComp Solutions Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Research Skills

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with EduComp Solutions Digital Technologies!
